mapper.sql: rta.demand_code, rta.re_employee_id, rta.interview_by, rta.current_status, rta.appraise, rta.interview_content, rta.salary, rta.trial_time, rta.medical_class, rta.repeal_flag, rta.repeal_date, rta.repeal_reason, rta.approval_result, rta.oa_order, rta.approval_date, rta.trial_status, rta.fail_describes, rta.enabled_flag,rta.submit_flag, rta.trial_entry_time, rta.trial_fail_reason, rta.id, rta.create_time, rta.create_by, rta.update_time, rta.update_by,rta.approval_employee,rta.approval_node,rta.demand_job_id, rta.surplus_quantity

${tAlias}.demand_code as ${tAlias}_demand_code, ${tAlias}.re_employee_id as ${tAlias}_re_employee_id, ${tAlias}.interview_by as ${tAlias}_interview_by, ${tAlias}.current_status as ${tAlias}_current_status, ${tAlias}.appraise as ${tAlias}_appraise, ${tAlias}.interview_content as ${tAlias}_interview_content, ${tAlias}.salary as ${tAlias}_salary, ${tAlias}.trial_time as ${tAlias}_trial_time, ${tAlias}.medical_class as ${tAlias}_medical_class, ${tAlias}.repeal_flag as ${tAlias}_repeal_flag, ${tAlias}.repeal_date as ${tAlias}_repeal_date, ${tAlias}.repeal_reason as ${tAlias}_repeal_reason, ${tAlias}.approval_result as ${tAlias}_approval_result, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.approval_date as ${tAlias}_approval_date, ${tAlias}.trial_status as ${tAlias}_trial_status, ${tAlias}.fail_describes as ${tAlias}_fail_describes, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.submit_flag as ${tAlias}_submit_flag, ${tAlias}.trial_entry_time as ${tAlias}_trial_entry_time, ${tAlias}.trial_fail_reason as ${tAlias}_trial_fail_reason, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.approval_employee as ${tAlias}_approval_employee, ${tAlias}.approval_node as ${tAlias}_approval_node, ${tAlias}.demand_job_id as ${tAlias}_demand_job_id

select
,
, (datediff(year, rr.birthday, GETDATE()) - (case WHEN month(GETDATE()) < month(rr.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE (case WHEN month(GETDATE()) = month(rr.birthday) AND day(GETDATE()) < day(rr.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) END)) AS rr_age , ISNULL(rr_re.id, -1) rr_re_id,
,
,
from (select *, (select (sum(isnull(rdj1.agree_num,0)) - sum(isnull(rdj1.pass_quantity,0))) from re_demand_job rdj1,re_demand rd1 where rdj1.demand_id = rd1.id and rd1.demand_code = re_trial_approval.demand_code) surplus_quantity from re_trial_approval ) rta join re_demand rd on rta.demand_code = rd.demand_code join re_demand_job rdj on rta.demand_job_id = rdj.id join re_recruitment rr on rta.re_employee_id = rr.id left join re_education rr_re on rr.id = rr_re.re_id and rr_re.new_education_flag = 1
mapper.insert: insert into re_trial_approval (demand_code, re_employee_id, interview_by, current_status, appraise, interview_content, salary, trial_time, medical_class, repeal_flag, repeal_date, repeal_reason, approval_result, oa_order, approval_date, trial_status, fail_describes, enabled_flag, submit_flag,trial_entry_time, trial_fail_reason, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by,approval_employee,approval_node, demand_job_id) values (#{demand.demandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trialEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{interviewBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appraise,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interviewContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{trialTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{medicalClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{repealFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{repealDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{repealReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{trialStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{failDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT},#{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{trialEntryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{trialFailReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{demandJob.id,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_trial_approval set demand_code = #{demand.demandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, re_employee_id = #{trialEmployee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, interview_by = #{interviewBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, current_status = #{currentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, appraise = #{appraise,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, interview_content = #{interviewContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salary = #{salary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, trial_time = #{trialTime,jdbcType=INTEGER}, medical_class = #{medicalClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, repeal_flag = #{repealFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, repeal_date = #{repealDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, repeal_reason = #{repealReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_date = #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, trial_status = #{trialStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fail_describes = #{failDescribes,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, submit_flag = #{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, trial_entry_time = #{trialEntryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, trial_fail_reason = #{trialFailReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, demand_job_id = #{demandJob.id,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update re_trial_approval set
current_status = #{currentStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salary = #{salary,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update re_trial_approval set repeal_flag = #{repealFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, repeal_date = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, repeal_reason = #{repealReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update re_trial_approval set trial_fail_reason = #{trialFailReason, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, trial_entry_time = #{trialEntryTime, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, trial_status = #{trialStatus, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, fail_describes = #{failDescribes,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, update_time = getdate(), update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType = BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and enabled_flag = 1
